About
What is HatzCatz?
🐱🎩

The Story

HatzCatz is a collection of 2222 unique pixel art NFTs living on the Base network. Each HatzCatz is a one-of-a-kind character featuring a different hat, fur, expression, and accessory — no two are alike. Some cats wear hats. HatzCatz wear identity.

🎨

Pixel Art

Every HatzCatz is hand-crafted in pixel art style, generated from hundreds of unique traits to create truly one-of-a-kind digital identities.

⬡

Built on Base

HatzCatz lives on Base — Ethereum's fastest and most developer-friendly L2. Low gas fees mean more minting, less waiting.

✨

Traits & Rarity

🎩 Hats
🐱 Fur Type
👀 Eyes
👕 Outfit
🌈 Background
💎 Special
📋

Contract Info

Standard: ERC-721

Network: Base Mainnet

Supply: 2222 NFTs

Platform: Manifold

Roadmap
The Journey Ahead

🔍 Click to enlarge

Our roadmap is designed to grow step by step with the community. 🐾

① Foundation

Building the core vision, team, and identity of HatzCatz.

② Community & Branding

Growing a strong and active community while shaping the HatzCatz brand together.

③ Technology & Infrastructure

Preparing the technical side of the project including website and smart contract systems.

④ NFT Collection & Launch

Launching the HatzCatz collection through whitelist and public mint phases.

⑤ Community Activation

Creating events, collaborations, and fun experiences for the community.

⑥ Season 2: Let's Build Together

Collecting ideas and community feedback to shape the next season.

⑦ Season 2: We Create Together

Developing the selected ideas transparently with community participation.

⑧ Season 2: We Launch Together

Launching the new season together and continuing the journey as a growing universe.

The hat chooses you. 🎩🐱
